features: For salon or home use. Strong formula, ideal for Soak-off gel polish, acrylics, nail tips and glues
Removes Nail Polish in seconds. Removes safely and gently without causing damage
Strong formula, ideal for Soak-off gel polish, acrylics, nail tips and glues
Contains No Parabens, Sulphates, Propylene Glycol or Mineral Oil
description: Product Description Our 100% Pure Alcohol can be used for many things, including: Dehydrating and preparing the nailbed Cleaning Removing tacky layers from cured Gel Polish and Resin projects Leaving a high-quality, shiny finish Disinfecting surfaces and skin JND 100% Pure Alcohol The multi-purpose superhero! JND 100% pure alcohol is the solvent of choice for the preparation, cleaning and degreasing of all substrates prior to nail treatments. Specially formulated to give the highest quality finish for any gel treatments. Can be used for removing residue of gel application to provide a high-quality shine and finish. Our Alcohol is of professional quality and can be used in both Salons and at Home. We believe that everyone deserves access to the best products regardless of where or who they are. How To Use (Gel Application) Dampen a lint-free wipe (or cotton wool) with the alcohol then gently rub each nail. Wait until the nail is fully dry before applying each layer of gel. Once gel fully cured, dampen a lint-free wipe (or cotton wool) with the alcohol and gently wipe from cuticle to tip for each nail. Warning! Product is highly flammable. Always read the advisory label before use. Keep away from children.
